title: goniophlebium glaucophyllum
intro: Goniophlebium glaucophyllum is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Goniophlebium glaucophyllum are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Goniophlebium glaucophyllum are often made from its leaves, which can be dried and processed into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
